action.name: Open Terminal Here
action.description: Open kitty terminal in this directory

action.name: Open in VSCodium
action.description: Open file or folder in VSCodium

action.name: Set as Wallpaper
action.command: ln -sf %f ~/Pictures/Wallpapers/current.jpg && awww img %f --transition-type center --transition-duration 2 --transition-fps 165 && THEME=$(cat ~/.cache/current-theme 2>/dev/null); [ "$THEME" = "materialyou" ] && matugen image %f -m dark || notify-send "Wallpaper Changed" "Set to %n"
action.description: Set this image as wallpaper (with Material You if active)

action.name: Open in Yazi
action.description: Open this directory in Yazi file manager
